description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: build and test, using a pip cache at .cache/pip and setting PIP_CACHE_DIR. In the build stage add a build_checks job that runs on the python:latest image, executes pylint weaverforum || true, black weaverforum, isort --check-only weaverforum, pip-audit ., bandit -r weaverforum, coverage run example/manage.py test, coverage report -m, and coverage html, then stores the htmlcov directory as an artifact that expires in one day. In the test stage add five jobs (test-3.10-sqlite, test-3.11-sqlite, test-3.12-sqlite, test-3.13-sqlite, test-3.9-sqlite) each extending a .test template that runs python -V, creates and activates a virtual environment, upgrades pip, installs -e '.[dev]', and finally runs python3 example/manage.py test with the sqlite_test settings; the jobs use python:3.10 for the 3.10‑3.13 variants and python:3.9 for the 3.9 variant. Also define hidden templates .test and .test-postgresql where .test-postgresql adds pip install psycopg2, uses a postgres:latest service and sets POSTGRES_DB, POSTGRES_USER, POSTGRES_PASSWORD variables, and runs the same Django test command with postgresql_test settings. All jobs are interruptible and inherit the global cache.
